blocks.text: Smart Packaging for Smarter Retail
Retail Packaging
Shelf Ready & Consumer Packaging Solutions

Our Shelf Ready Packaging (SRP) solutions are designed to make retail operations faster, simpler, and more efficient. Engineered for easy product access, reduced handling time, and high shelf visibility, SRP cartons enhance both logistics and display performance. Manufactured from strong, recyclable materials, they reduce waste and improve on-shelf consistency — helping brands cut costs while maximizing visual impact.

Our Consumer Packaging connects brands with buyers at first glance. Combining innovative structure, sustainable materials, and premium offset printing, we craft packaging that protects, informs, and persuades. Designed to enhance the in-store experience and strengthen brand recognition, our cartons help retailers boost conversion and repeat purchase rates.
Retail Packaging Solutions

Our retail packaging solutions bridge the gap between supply-chain efficiency and consumer appeal.From Shelf Ready Packaging that improves logistics and on-shelf presentation to Consumer Packaging that inspires shopper confidence, XinYuan delivers solutions built for modern global retail.With standardized production lines, advanced offset printing, and eco-certified materials, we provide packaging that combines functionality, sustainability, and brand impact across all retail environments.

XinYuan’s retail packaging solutions are designed to make store operations faster, cleaner, and more cost-effective while boosting product visibility and brand experience.By combining advanced printing, converting, and logistics know-how, we ensure your packaging performs on both the shelf and the supply chain.
Applications:
• Supermarkets & Hypermarkets: Shelf-ready packaging (SRP) for instant display and restocking.
Supermarkets & Hypermarkets: Shelf-ready packaging (SRP) for instant display and restocking.
• E-commerce & Retail Chains: Custom carton sizing for consistent distribution.
E-commerce & Retail Chains: Custom carton sizing for consistent distribution.
• Food & Beverage: Recyclable, safe, and temperature-resistant packaging.
Food & Beverage: Recyclable, safe, and temperature-resistant packaging.
• Cosmetics & Consumer Goods: Vibrant, high-gloss folding cartons that build shelf presence.
Cosmetics & Consumer Goods: Vibrant, high-gloss folding cartons that build shelf presence.

Sustainability & PerformanceXinYuan prioritizes eco-design and material efficiency in every packaging project.We use responsibly sourced paperboard and water-based inks while recycling trim waste from production.Each packaging line is optimized for minimal handling, maximum stacking efficiency, and reduced CO₂ footprint.Our engineers collaborate with retail brands to standardize dimensions and improve pallet utilization — delivering measurable logistics savings without compromising visual quality.

Global Reach & ServiceWith production bases in Vietnam, China, and Thailand, XinYuan supports global retailers and manufacturers through streamlined supply chains.Our packaging integrates seamlessly into high-volume operations, ensuring stable delivery schedules and consistent brand quality worldwide.
